target:
# Try a different approach - look for Bodog poker review blogs or YouTube thumbnails with client images
# Also try the Wayback Machine via an alternative proxy
curl -s --max-time 20 "https://timetravel.mementoweb.org/" 2>&1 | head -5 &
# Try specific poker image databases and review sites
curl -s --max-time 15 "https://pokerlistings.com/bodog-poker" 2>&1 | grep -oP 'src="[^"]*(?:screenshot|software|client|bodog)[^"]*\.(jpg|png|gif)"' | head -10 &
wait
